description: An absent version marker conservatively produces a non-disclosing stale-ruleset result for every claude-code rule; the unrecognized env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY value uses the non-disclosing fallback, the three other env-based rules render their unset observation verbatim (env.KEY unset in user config, which discloses no configured content), and cleanupPeriodDays's unset rendering is quoted verbatim the same way.

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective local session transcript retention window cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: cleanupPeriodDays unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: tool version not detected — no version marker found on PATH

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective error-reporting posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers and the ambient process environment may supply or override it. Observed: env.DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: tool version not detected — no version marker found on PATH

Observed: env.DISABLE_FEEDBACK_COMMAND unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: tool version not detected — no version marker found on PATH

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective session quality survey posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers, other documented disable paths, and the ambient process environment may supply or override it. Observed: env.CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY unset in user config.
